svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" modified="2026-05-07T00:00:00.000Z" agent="Codex" version="24.0.0" type="device"> <diagram id="supply-chain-context-map" name="Supply Chain Context Map"> <mxGraphModel dx="1422" dy="794" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="ui" value="<b>User / UI</b><br>Commands + queries" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=14;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="335" width="170" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="simulation" value="<b>Simulation</b><br>Time + Map<br>fraarrmat11/MS-SIMULATION" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d6a427;strokeColor=#b07800;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=14;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="420" y="45" width="280" height="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="production" value="<b>Production</b><br>Factories + Recipes<br>Fepe7/Factory-Workshop-Gft" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#6d3fce;strokeColor=#4a2a9a;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=14;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="390" y="300" width="280" height="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="warehouse" value="<b>Warehouse</b><br>Core Domain<br>Esmeralda6/Warehouse-Workshop" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1d9e75;strokeColor=#0f6e56;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=14;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;strokeWidth=3;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="760" y="300" width="280" height="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="transport" value="<b>Transport</b><br>Trucks<br>PauLopNun/transport-service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#185fa5;strokeColor=#0c447c;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=14;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1130" y="300" width="240" height="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reporting" value="<b>Reporting</b><br>Event log + projections" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#993c1d;strokeColor=#712b13;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=14;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="760" y="635" width="280" height="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rest-simulation" value="<b>REST</b><br>POST /tick<br>GET /map" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="425" y="165" width="270" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rest-production" value="<b>REST</b><br>POST /factories, POST /recipes<br>GET /recipes, GET /factories/{productId}<br>POST /warehouses/{warehouseId}/orders" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="370" y="420" width="320" height="82" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="warehouse-gap" value="<b>Repo status</b><br>Domain implemented<br>REST/RabbitMQ adapters pending<br>shipment.requested.v1 intended" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#f9a825;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="760" y="420" width="280" height="82" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rest-transport" value="<b>REST</b><br>POST /trucks<br>GET /trucks<br><b>Gap</b> shipment listener empty" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1130" y="420" width="240" height="82" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" value="<b>Legend</b><br>Solid arrow: implemented/configured<br>Dashed arrow: intended or incomplete<br>Reporting consumes event fan-out" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="40" width="300" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-ui-sim" value="REST commands / reads" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#555555;fontColor=#555555;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="ui" target="simulation"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e-ui-prod" value="REST setup + store order" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#555555;fontColor=#555555;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="ui" target="production"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e-ui-tr" value="REST truck admin / initial state" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#555555;fontColor=#555555;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="ui" target="transport"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e-time-prod" value="time.advanced.v1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#d6a427;fontColor=#d6a427;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="simulation" target="production"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e-time-tr" value="time.advanced.v1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#d6a427;fontColor=#d6a427;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="simulation" target="transport"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e-prod-wh" value="production.materials.requested.v1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#6d3fce;fontColor=#6d3fce;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="production" target="warehouse"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e-wh-tr" value="shipment.requested.v1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#1d9e75;fontColor=#1d9e75;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=6 4;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="warehouse" target="transport"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e-tr-wh" value="delivery.completed.v1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#185fa5;fontColor=#185fa5;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="transport" target="warehouse"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e-tr-prod" value="delivery.completed.v1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#185fa5;fontColor=#185fa5;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="transport" target="production"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e-tr-sim" value="truck.registered.v1 / truck.position.updated.v1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#888888;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=11;dashed=1;dashPattern=4 4;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="transport" target="simulation"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e-wh-sim" value="warehouse.registered.v1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#888888;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=11;dashed=1;dashPattern=4 4;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="warehouse" target="simulation"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e-all-reporting" value="all business events" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#888888;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=11;dashed=1;dashPattern=4 4;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="production" target="reporting"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e-tr-reporting" value="truck.status.changed.v1 / delivery.completed.v1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#888888;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=11;dashed=1;dashPattern=4 4;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="transport" target="reporting"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
